name: lebron
description: Jeff Benedict's biography — building an inner circle, turning instability into drive, and leveraging athletic success into a billion-dollar empire and social impact.
useCase: Building a loyal team, recovering from public backlash, leveraging a platform, turning origin story into fuel, building beyond your primary career.
knownRisks: Benedict's biography is admiring — not a critical or investigative account
LeBron's specific circumstances (once-in-a-generation talent) may not generalize
The business and sports landscape has shifted since LeBron's early career
